case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OMAR ISAIAS PADRON UICAB

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UICAB, OMAR ISAIAS PADRON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OMAR ISAIAS PADRON UICAB IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UICAB, OMAR ISAIAS PADRON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UICAB, OMAR ISAIAS PADRON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
